items.title: Tata Steel Q3 Results: Cons PAT soars 723% YoY to Rs 2,689 crore, revenue up 6%
items.description: Steel major Tata Steel reported a 723% jump in its December quarter consolidated net profit at Rs 2,689 crore compared to Rs 327 crore reported in the year ago period.

items.title: SBI Q3 Results Preview: PAT to fall up to 15% QoQ despite up to 4% likely growth in NII. 5 things to watch
items.description: SBI is set to post steady Q3FY26 results with healthy loan growth and resilient net interest income, but sequential profit may dip as margins compress, provisions rise, and one-off gains are absent, keeping focus on asset quality and management commentary.

items.title: NSE Q3 Results: Profit falls 37% YoY to Rs 2,408 crore
items.description: NSE Q3 Results: Leading exchange NSE reported a 37% year-on-year (YoY) slump in its consolidated net profit at Rs 2,408 crore in the third quarter, while total income fell 9% YoY to Rs 4,395 crore.

items.title: Kalyan Jewellers Q3 Results: Consolidated profit rises 90% to Rs 416 crore
items.description: Jewellery retailer Kalyan Jewellers India on Friday reported a 90.36 per cent growth in consolidated net profit to Rs 416.29 crore.

items.title: Spencer's Retail Q3 loss widens to Rs 58.4 cr, revenue slips marginally
items.description: The company posted a net loss of Rs 47.34 crore in the October-December period a year ago, according to a regulatory filing from Spencer's Retail, a RP Sanjiv Goenka group firm.
